requirement_summary: Accept telemetry over MQTT and HTTPS adapters without core changes
Validate every inbound payload against a versioned schema
Reject malformed payloads with no partial side effects
Route valid telemetry to configured sinks
design_element: Core Telemetry Domain; Sink Adapter Layer

requirement_summary: Authenticate MQTT clients before accepting telemetry
Include device ID timestamp schema version and adapter metadata
Preserve diagnostic metadata for rejected events without secrets
Avoid logging secrets credentials tokens or raw PII
Expose health readiness metrics traces and structured logs
Support rollback of adapter changes via config or feature flags
